description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Win MSVC, Linux GCC, Linux Clang that runs on push to the default branch, on pull requests to the default branch, and on workflow dispatch. Use a matrix job that runs on both ubuntu-latest and windows-latest, with different compiler toolchains and build types. For each matrix combination, check out the repository with submodules, configure CMake with the specified compilers and build type, and then build the project.
